lanes.subject: Need landing page for PodCast Forge
lanes.context: Megaphone needs a high-converting landing page for the new PodCast Forge product. Requirements: hero section with demo video, pricing table, testimonials carousel, and a CTA that doesn't suck.

lanes.subject: Deploy competitive analysis dashboard ASAP
lanes.context: Two competitors shifted pricing this week. Radar needs a live dashboard tracking competitor features, pricing, and positioning. Real-time updates from scraped data.

lanes.subject: Build compliance training tracker module
lanes.context: Need a module that tracks training completion across all agents. Dashboard showing completion rates, deadlines, and flagged items.

lanes.subject: Q2 burn rate projection analysis
lanes.context: Cashflow needs Radar to validate the Q2 burn rate assumptions before presenting to The Boss. Current model shows 23% overshoot if marketing doesn't adjust.

lanes.subject: Social media template refresh for Q2
lanes.context: Current templates are stale. Need 8 new templates for LinkedIn, X, and Instagram that align with the Q2 brand refresh.

lanes.subject: Review UI components for v2.4 dashboard
lanes.context: Forge shipped 14 new components. Canvas needs to review for brand compliance, spacing consistency, and color accuracy before merge.

lanes.subject: Emergency: NexaCore runway recalculation needed
lanes.context: NexaCore's primary revenue stream dropped 40% this week. Founder needs an immediate runway recalculation. Blocked because the Stripe integration data feed is returning stale data.

lanes.subject: Intelligence brief: 3 market windows in Q2
lanes.context: Three market windows identified for Q2: AI-powered podcast tools, micro-SaaS for freelancers, and automated social proof aggregation.

lanes.subject: Q2 brand assets package ready
lanes.context: Complete brand refresh package: new color variations, icon set, typography guidelines, and 16 social templates. All approved by Brand Guard.

lanes.subject: Need API credentials for new contractor
lanes.context: New contractor 'DataWiz' needs access to staging environment, GitHub org, and Slack workspace. Background check pending review.

lanes.subject: March cash flow reconciliation complete
lanes.context: All March transactions reconciled. Found 2 duplicate charges ($340 total). Report includes per-project burn rates and updated runway forecasts.

lanes.subject: Validate viral content thesis before launch
lanes.context: Megaphone wants to push a controversial take on AI replacing agencies. Sentinel flagged it for brand risk review. Need Radar to validate the thesis with data before proceeding.
